daily.today_energy: Your vibe is all about balance and magnetic presence. The universe is giving you permission to take up space today—lean into your natural charm without overthinking it.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the energy shift in you. Whether it's new or existing, connections deepen when you show up authentically. Don't dim yourself down to fit someone else's comfort.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Trust that creative instinct bubbling up—it's worth exploring, even if it feels unconventional. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. A walk, dancing in your room, whatever brings joy—that's the energy your system needs right now.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is calling you to trust your gut, Libra. Venus is vibing in your favor, amplifying your natural magnetism. It's time to stop overthinking and lean into what actually feels right. Expect clarity by midweek.
weekly.love: Your people are drawn to your authenticity rn. Whether you're single or coupled up, this is about being real instead of playing it safe. A conversation you've been avoiding? The universe is basically nudging you to have it. Good timing.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different this week. Don't dim them down to fit the room—actually pitch that project or bring up that initiative. The energy supports bold moves, not quiet resignation. Your confidence will carry you further than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to move intentionally, not frantically. Think walks that clear your head or yoga that actually feels good, not punishment. Sleep matters more than you've been treating it. Prioritize rest like it's non-negotiable.
